headers.value: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' https://cdn.onesignal.com; worker-src 'self' blob: https://cdn.onesignal.com; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' data: blob:; font-src 'self' data:; connect-src 'self' https://onesignal.com https://*.onesignal.com; frame-src 'self' https://onesignal.com https://*.onesignal.com; frame-ancestors 'none'; base-uri 'self'; form-action 'self'
